name: TxLINE off-chain API for the Hybrid on-chain/off-chain TxODDS Data system
description: Overview This API provides access to real-time and historical sports data from the TxLINE on-chain/off-chain Data system. It makes proprietary TxODDS available for any funded blockchain users by linking the on-chain subscribe transaction by issuing time-limited API tokens. - The data is canonicalised so that all fixtures, odds, or scores are provably identifiable and ordered--confirmed by…
